reason: Legacy access-user responses may omit row capabilities; production callers pass defaultAllowed=false so missing metadata fails closed while tests and compatibility helpers can request the historical default.
Legacy access-user rows may omit both can_change_active_status and can_deactivate; production callers pass defaultAllowed=false so absence is denied unless a compatibility caller opts in.
Edit-action compatibility fallback is retained only for rows without capabilities; production Access users table passes defaultAllowed=false.
